title: Evaluate Manifest-Connected L0 Discovery Advisor Diagnostics
objective: Evaluate the manifest-connected L0 discovery advisor diagnostics on representative context-pack tasks so the project can judge suggestion usefulness, stability, noise, and safety before any automatic L0 inclusion or adapter behavior is proposed.
proposed_change: Add a proposal-only evaluation slice that exercises the existing opt-in manifest.diagnostics.l0_discovery_advisor path against representative context-pack tasks or fixtures and records diagnostic evidence. The evaluation must not change ContextPackManifest.items, provider prompts, latest-context prompt paths, retrieval, embedding, indexes, memory stores, token-budget behavior, reranking, or adapters.
rationale: PLAN-20260706-0004 made advisor suggestions visible through context manifest diagnostics, but did not measure whether the suggestions are useful or safe.
GAP-0001 remains open even after explicit inclusion, candidate diagnostics, simulator, advisor, and manifest diagnostics bridge work.
Automatic L0 inclusion would be premature without evidence about suggestion quality, redundancy, noise, and stale or unsafe suggestions.
An evaluation slice is smaller and safer than an automatic-selection slice because it only records evidence from existing diagnostic-only behavior.
The evaluation can provide the warrant basis for deciding whether a later automatic include_l0 or adapter PLAN is justified.
constraints: Proposal only: no implementation is admitted by this PLAN record.
No vector index or document index mutation.
No token-budget enforcement or token-budget telemetry.
Any evaluation implementation requires separate admission by WARRANT before governed improvement work begins.
success_criteria: SELF_MODEL records PLAN-20260707-0001 as proposed, open, and not admitted.
The proposed evaluation scope is limited to existing diagnostic-only advisor output.
The proposal defines evidence needed before any automatic L0 inclusion PLAN can be considered.
The proposal keeps advisor output outside ContextPackManifest.items and outside provider prompt construction.
No CAP, VERIFY, WARRANT, or implementation claim is added by this PLAN-only slice.
SELF-AUDIT remains green after the proposed PLAN is indexed.
risk: Advisor evaluation may be mistaken for approval of automatic L0 inclusion unless the PLAN keeps measurement separate from selection, prompt construction, retrieval, embeddings, indexes, memory stores, token-budget systems, reranking, and adapters.
next_action: Seek a WARRANT to admit only a diagnostic evaluation implementation. Do not add automatic include_l0 behavior, mutate ContextPackManifest.items, change provider prompts or latest-context prompt paths, perform live retrieval, call external embedding APIs, create production embeddings, mutate vector/document indexes or memory stores, add token-budget enforcement/telemetry, add non-none reranking, or introduce adapter behavior.
